overall.description: A first-person walk along a futuristic waterfront promenade at sunset in a cyberpunk city. The camera moves past pedestrians and neon-lit buildings, briefly tilting up to reveal a massive cylindrical tower marked '02', then continues toward an overpass structure.

segments.scene_description: Walking along a wide waterfront promenade at sunset, with a metal railing separating the path from the calm river on the left. Futuristic buildings with large digital billboards line the right side, while a bridge spans the river in the distance. Sparse pedestrians walk in the same direction, and occasional futuristic cars drive along the road to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: viewing angle shifted upward toward a towering cylindrical building

events.description: glitch transition effect occurs and camera tilts upward to focus on a tall cylindrical tower

agents.ego_description: tilting head upward to look at the towering building while continuing to walk forward

entered.detail: massive cylindrical concrete tower with illuminated '02' signage near the top

segments.scene_description: Following a glitch transition, the camera tilts sharply upward to reveal a massive cylindrical tower marked with illuminated '02' signage against the orange sunset sky. The perspective emphasizes the tower's height as the camera continues moving forward. The surrounding buildings and river bridge from the previous view are now behind or in the periphery.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade approaching an overpass structure

events.description: camera tilts back down to eye level from looking up at the tower
approaching the overpass bridge structure that spans the walkway ahead

agents.ego_description: walking forward along the promenade toward the overpass structure

notable_agents.action: person walking ahead on the path toward the overpass

entered.detail: elevated highway or monorail structure crossing over the promenade walkway
complex multi-level industrial structure with metal walkways and platforms

segments.scene_description: The camera returns to eye level and continues along the waterfront promenade, approaching a large overpass structure that spans the walkway ahead. The cylindrical tower is now behind, replaced by industrial structures on the right and the river on the left. The camera moves steadily toward the overpass, with pedestrians visible walking ahead on the path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey along a futuristic waterfront promenade that shifts from a wide urban vista to a towering architectural perspective before concluding at a massive overpass. It begins by moving past a metal railing and calm river, flanked by digital billboards and sparse pedestrians under a sunset sky. As a glitch transition occurs, the camera tilts sharply upward to reveal a massive cylindrical tower marked with illuminated 02 signage that dominates the orange horizon. The perspective then returns to eye level, leaving the tower behind as the path shifts toward industrial structures on the right. Finally, the camera moves steadily forward, following the flow of pedestrians toward a large overpass structure spanning the walkway ahead.
